## Severity

<!-- How severe is the impact of this bug? -->

- [ ] Critical — System is unusable or data is corrupted
- [ ] High — Major feature is broken with no workaround
- [ ] Medium — Feature is broken but a workaround exists
- [ ] Low — Minor defect with minimal impact
